abyssal_mastery.title: Use the Abyssal Beam spell (T.O. Magic 'n Extras / traveloptics: — the ISS addon from Leviathan fight, Ch11)

spell_loadout.title: Assemble a complete 5-spell combat loadout using spells from at least 3 different ISS schools

subtitle.text: The Leviathan's gift was not the ingot. The ingot enabled the beam. The beam is the gift.

description: T.O. Magic 'n Extras (namespace: traveloptics:) is an ISS addon that adds the Abyssal Beam.
The Abyssal Spellweave Ingot is a guaranteed drop from the Leviathan (Ch11 fight).
The ingot unlocks the Abyssal Beam spell — a deep-ocean focused destruction spell.
The Abyssal Beam is one of the most powerful spells in the pack.
Using it in Ch17 completes the arc from killing the Leviathan in Ch11
to weaponizing what it taught you.
2. Fireball or Explode (Fire school — area damage)
4. Ender Slash or Void Tentacles (Ender school — mobility + gap close)
5. Chain Lightning or Thunderstorm (Lightning school — AOE)
This is the culmination of Ch06's Iron's Spellbooks introduction.
Seventeen chapters later, you are an archmage.
